issues.description: Condition missing: 'If you have less Life cards than your opponent' requires a life comparison condition (e.g., PlayerLifeLessThanOpponent or similar), not 'Always'
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' is unexplained and not in original card text. Card text only describes one On Play effect. This should be removed.
Second effect trashes 1 card, but card text requires trashing 2 cards
